rationale.R1.2: The review identifies multiple inconsistencies in the text, particularly regarding stability claims and order of convergence. It proposes specific fixes for these issues.
rationale.RX.1: The review expresses uncertainty about the novelty of the agent framework and the generalizability of the results to multi-physics problems.
rationale.RX.3: The review focuses on the technical content of the paper and does not stray significantly from the requested scope.
rationale.RX.4: The review carefully analyzes the potential for harm in the proposed method, particularly regarding stability claims and numerical accuracy.
rationale.RX.5: The review does not provide specific examples or evidence to support its claims about the provenance of the ideas presented.
